evals.name: output-no-file-written
evals.expected_output: A single copy-pasteable 'Decisions to formalize' block, with ADR items ordered parents-before-children and a suggested relation when there is a dependency, followed by a visible isolated prompt asking the human to copy the list. No file is written, no ADR created, prd.md is left byte-identical.

assertions.text: Output contains a single copy-pasteable 'Decisions to formalize' block
ADR-tagged items are ordered topologically (parents before children) with a suggested relation (Refines/Extends/Constrains) on dependent items
A visible, isolated final prompt asks the human to copy the list before proceeding
No new file appears in the CWD after the run (checked against the filesystem, not the transcript)
prd.md is byte-identical before and after the run (sha256 unchanged)
